item.title: It Wasn’t Just an Accident
item.description: A true crime mystery centered on the question of whether this was more than an accident.

item.title: Murder Case With a Web of Lies

item.title: A killer who couldn’t stay quiet
item.description: A true crime case about a killer whose behavior drew attention and raised questions in the investigation.
